title: gentiana pubigera subsp. ninglangensis
intro: Gentiana pubigera subsp. ninglangensis is a rare, endangered species of flowering plant in the gentian family, native to China's Sichuan, Yunnan, and Guizhou provinces. Traditionally, this plant is used in Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Gentiana pubigera subsp. ninglangensis include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, improve immune function, and reduce oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots are often dried and used to make teas or infusions, which are also sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
